/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/ImageLab.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageLab.dir/src/String.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageLab.dir/src/ImageManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageLab.dir/src/Image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageLab.dir/src/PBMImage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageLab.dir/src/PGMImage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageLab.dir/src/PPMImage.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageLab.dir/src/BlurFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageLab.dir/src/SharpenFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageLab.dir/src/SobelFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageLab.dir/src/ThresholdFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageLab.dir/src/NegativeFilter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/ImageLab.dir/src/ContrastStretchingFilter.cpp.o -o ImageLab
